page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc8i.3xlarge is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing an Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at a clock speed of 3.3 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio, each of the 12 vCPUs maps directly to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource contention from hyperthreading.

The instance is configured with 24.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for data persistence. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 10 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a resource density perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and 1:2 RAM-to-vCPU ratio position this instance as a cost-efficient option for compute-bound workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. The absence of bundled local storage and GPUs makes it highly specialized for pure processing tasks. Suitable workloads include high-performance web serving, batch processing, compute-intensive CI/CD pipelines, and distributed analytics nodes where CPU performance is the primary bottleneck.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfc8i.3xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 12 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 12 physical cores on an Intel Xeon 6462C processor running at 3.3 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and managed via the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 24.0 GB of system memory, establishing a 2.0 GB per core ratio. It contains no local storage or GPUs, relying on network-attached storage for data persistence, and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The dedicated, non-hyperthreaded CPU allocation ensures predictable performance for compute-heavy tasks. This configuration is highly suited for workloads such as batch processing, web serving, and compute-intensive compilation pipelines where processing power is prioritized over memory capacity.

tagline: A compute-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and a lean memory profile for high-throughput processing workloads.
bullet_points: 12 dedicated physical cores with an Intel Xeon 6462C processor at 3.3 GHz
24.0 GB of system memory providing a 2.0 GB per core ratio
10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for reliable connectivity
No bundled local storage or GPU resources to optimize compute-only costs
Best suited for batch processing, web serving, and compute-heavy workloads
